response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit with 13+ years of full-stack development and 10+ years specifically with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, a required but difficult-to-find skill. He demonstrates solid architecture, testing culture, database and cloud expertise (AWS, Docker, MongoDB), and strong communication skills. Primary concerns are a 7-month career gap (Feb-Oct 2025) requiring context, and Nest.js/specific testing frameworks not explicitly mentioned—though his Node.js/TypeScript foundation makes these readily learnable.
strengths: Perfect alignment with primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with 10+ years focused experience and active recent use
Current role directly addresses required skill of AI-agent infrastructure development and MCP tooling
Strong software craftsmanship foundation evidenced by consistent TDD/testing emphasis, architecture contributions, and 19 years of continuous development across diverse platforms
concerns: Career gap of 7 months (Oct 2025–May 2026) requires clarification; combined with earlier 2-month gap creates questions about recent stability
Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being listed as primary stack; relies on Node.js/TypeScript transferability
Testing framework specifics (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) and Kotlin experience not explicitly mentioned despite being in tech requirements

key_factors.factor: Recent career discontinuity (9 months gap/short tenure)
